text.message: am I a bigger threat than red?
worried about u plowing to 9 ore
plus it was a higher chance to get wood from u
rob me again and ur game is over
lol if that's u being friendly i'd hate to see u unfriendly
double robbing me 1st 2 rolls was extreme
u were the only one with points
what the 2 points everyone else had?
the first rob was for the wood, the second rob was when u had 3
literally 1st 2 rolls back to back robs
no im talking about 1st 2 of game
it was a 50/50 shot on a resource i dont produce
i am u were winning so i blocked u
im just saying 9 and 10 are also fair blocks
didnt realize using the built in chat function intended for strategizng was crying about it my mistake
idk what u want from me. blue has a city, u have two down devs
im just trying to play an honest game of catan
U can hit red he has 2 devs lol
now u care about who's ahead?
black doesn't roll a city on every 8
he's just a friendly little road player
im blocking 60% of a city and a free card for blue
like sorry u share one of the best blocks on board?
ur being intentionally obtuse i think this conversation is over.
lol its literally black and blue
and u wanna make my game impossible
black, blue am i in the wrong here?
black is on ur side hes winning
No dont listen to this guy
i wonder what allowed that to happen
i told u what id do
im muting you now. u can work with blue and i'll work with blue and maybe we can balance this board
i couldve done it on the first block
now the rolls are coming oj
if ur strategy is so sound why didnt u win?
